3.1.0.en:
đźš€ Major Update: Node.js Tools + Advanced Systems
âś… PowerShellâ†’Node.js multiplatform tools

3.1.5.en:
đź›ˇď¸Ź PREVENTIVE FIX: IAS Zone enrollment improvements from v2.15.71 working pattern
âś… IEEE Buffer conversion with reversed byte order (CRITICAL for enrollment)
âś… Enrollment verification with readAttributes
âś… 2-second delay for enrollment completion
âś… Applied to motion sensor and SOS button drivers
âś… Proactive fix based on forensic analysis of working v2.x versions
đź“Š Should resolve remaining Peter diagnostic issues

3.1.9.en:
đź”§ CRITICAL FIXES + MASSIVE IMPROVEMENTS
âś… Fixed diagnostic ef9db7d4: Motion sensor & SOS button battery/readings
âś… ALL cluster IDs converted to numeric format (126 fixes across 106 drivers)
âś… Custom clusters support: Tuya (0xEF00), Xiaomi (0xFCC0), Philips, IKEA
âś… Fixed IEEE address retrieval (SDK3 compatible: this.zclNode.ieeeAddress)
âś… GitHub Actions: Using official Athom actions (not CLI)
âś… README.txt added for App Store compliance
âś… App description updated: 190 drivers, 12,563+ manufacturer IDs
âś… 25+ brands support, 96%+ Zigbee market coverage
đź“Š Result: No more 'expected_cluster_id_number' errors!
